name: node-babel-plugin-polyfill-corejs3
title: node-babel-plugin-polyfill-corejs3
summary: node-babel plugin to inject corejs3 polyfill
description:
node-babel plugin to inject corejs3 polyfill
node-babel-polyfills will provide a set of node-babel7 plugins that
enable injecting different polyfills with different strategies in
the compiled code.
.
This package provides babel-plugin-polyfill-corejs3
